item.title: North Korean leader's sister criticizes US-South Korea for joint drills
item.description: The sister of North Korean leader Kim Jong Un has criticized the United States and South Korea for proceeding with their annual joint military exercis...

item.title: War with Iran delivers another shock to the global economy
item.description: The war with Iran is doing collateral damage to the world economy

item.title: Asian shares surge, echoing rally on Wall Street as oil prices sank back to about $90
item.description: Global shares have rebounded from their sharp declines a day before

item.title: In a time of war with Iran, Americans unite in aggravation over sticker shock at the gas pump
item.description: It seems that a country divided on many fronts is finding common ground at the gas pumps

item.title: Saudi Arabia oil giant Aramco reports 2025 profit of $104 billion, down from 2024
item.description: Saudi Arabia oil giant Aramco reports 2025 profit of $104 billion, down from 2024
